case_title: SHAWN JACKSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2018 - JUDGMENT. CCSF IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR SIDEWALK HAZARD. OWNER OF PROPERTY ADJACENT TO SIDEWALK OBLIGATED TO MAINTAIN THE SIDEWALK IN A SAFE CONDITION. PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE EVIDENCE (EMERGENCY ROOM RECORDS) OF MEDICAL TREATMENT. CLAIM OF PAIN AND SUFFERING NTO SUPPORTED BY TESTIMONY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, SHAWN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
SHAWN JACKSON, PLAINTIFF
JOYCELYN GADIANE APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT

The parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court rules in favor of defendant CCSF pursuant to Public Works Code 706 (Article 15, Sec. 706).
All exhibits are returned to respective parties.
Court adjourns.

Judge Newton J. Lam, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported.
